message:
refactor(syscall): migrate fortify_abi to native syscalls

Migrated 8 libc::syscall calls:
- __pread_chk, __pread64_chk (pread64)
- __recv_chk, __recvfrom_chk (recvfrom)
- __open_2, __open64_2 (open)
- __openat_2, __openat64_2 (openat)
- Added SYS_RECVFROM constant and sys_recvfrom, sys_open wrappers

bd-h5x EPIC progress: 651->643 libc::syscall calls remaining

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
